Off Calendar Dec-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF DEANNA KUNG'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER OF DEFENDANTS TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. No opposition was filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 =(301/PJB)
